Chephirah =" lioness" 1) a city of the Gibeonites subsequently assigned to the tribe of Benjamin
רקם וחגר REKEM AND ḤEGER — Translation of "Kadeish and Bared," as they were translated "between Rekem and Ḥeger" (Genesis 16:14).
Therefore the well was called: Be’er Lachai Ro’i [the well at which a living angel appeared]; it is between Kadeish [Rekem] and Bared [Chagar].
